fault_hypothesis: The function uses logical OR (`a or b`) on line 67 to combine mask elements, but the specification requires logical AND (`a and b`). This results in `True` when only one input is `True`, violating the conjunction requirement.

constraints.intent: The element just appended must be the logical AND of the corresponding input elements.
Each element in the merged list must be the logical AND of the elements from the input masks at the same position.

spec.expr: sum(1 for x in merged if x) == sum(1 for i in range(len(merged)) if mask_a[i] and mask_b[i])

constraints.intent: The count of True values in the merged prefix must match the count of positions where both inputs were True.

spec.expr: all(__cbfl_result[i] == (mask_a[i] and mask_b[i]) for i in range(len(mask_a)))

constraints.intent: The final returned mask must be the element-wise conjunction of the two input masks.
